---
title: "Rascunho ME712"
author: "Gisele Amorim"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

Leitura do banco 
```{r}
dados <- read_xlsx("Dataset.xlsx")
head(dados)
summary(dados)
```
```{r}
dados_long <- dados %>% pivot_longer(cols = c(`Very coarse sand (%)`, `Coarse sand(%)`, `Medium sand (%)`, `Fine sand (%)`, `Very fine sand (%)`), 
                       values_to = "valor", names_to = "Type Sand")
```

```{r}
dados_long %>% ggplot(aes(x = `Type Sand`, y = valor, fill = `Type Sand`)) + 
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Boxplot Percentual de Areia", x = "Tipo de Areia", y = "Valor") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
library(GGally)
dados_long %>% select(-Sample)
ggpairs(dados_long, lower = list(continuous = "smooth"))
```
